title: cephaelis peduncularis var. palmetorum
intro: Cephaelis peduncularis var. palmetorum, also known as Palmetto Coffee Tree, is a plant species native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cephaelis peduncularis var. palmetorum include its ability to support kidney function, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
